calendar.matters:
Second Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s (Second) Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Etc.
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ryan L. Dahm of the law offices of Cook Collection Attorneys PLC (415-989-4730) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

Stipulation and order appointing judge pro tem is signed and filed. Submitted without argument, the Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Etc. is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Noah Lebowitz: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (DISC302)
